data.name: graphicsBox.ToolTip
data.value: Left drag (near the center of the screen): Rotate by the axis parallel to monitor Left drag (at the edge of the screen): Rotate by the axis normal to monitor Right click: Zoom out Right-drag: Zoom in the selected area Middle drag: Drag the simulated image

data.name: label7.ToolTip
data.value: Choose the delimiter character placed between Miller indices.

data.name: radioButtonDelimiterSpace.ToolTip
data.value: Use space as delimiter for index output

data.name: radioButtonDelimiterComma.ToolTip
data.value: Use comma as delimiter for index output

data.name: label1.ToolTip
data.value: Set the font size of the projected index labels ([u v w] for axes, (h k l) for planes); the minimum value hides the labels.

data.name: trackBarStrSize.ToolTip
data.value: Set the font size of the projected index labels ([u v w] for axes, (h k l) for planes); the minimum value hides the labels.

data.name: checkBoxSpecifyLabelColor.ToolTip
data.value: Use a fixed color for index labels instead of the spot color.

data.name: colorControlIndexLabel.ToolTip
data.value: Set the fixed color used for index labels when 'Specify color' is enabled.

data.name: colorControlIndexLabel.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the fixed color used for index labels when 'Specify color' is enabled.

data.name: label4.ToolTip
data.value: Set the width of the stereonet outline (grid) lines (1–20).

data.name: trackBarOutlineLineWidth.ToolTip
data.value: Set the width of the stereonet outline (grid) lines (1–20).

data.name: colorControlBackGround.ToolTip
data.value: Set the background color of the stereonet drawing area.

data.name: colorControlBackGround.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the background color of the stereonet drawing area.

data.name: colorControl90DegLine.ToolTip
data.value: Set the color of the 90° lines (outer primitive circle and principal axes, the thickest lines).

data.name: colorControl90DegLine.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the color of the 90° lines (outer primitive circle and principal axes, the thickest lines).

data.name: colorControl10DegLine.ToolTip
data.value: Set the color of the 10° grid lines (latitude/longitude every 10°) of the stereonet.

data.name: colorControl10DegLine.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the color of the 10° grid lines (latitude/longitude every 10°) of the stereonet.

data.name: colorControl1DegLine.ToolTip
data.value: Set the color of the 1° grid lines (fine lines, shown only when '1° Lines' is enabled).

data.name: colorControl1DegLine.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the color of the 1° grid lines (fine lines, shown only when '1° Lines' is enabled).

data.name: radioButtonOutlineEquator.ToolTip
data.value: Project the latitude and longitude lines from the equatorial direction.

data.name: radioButtonOutlinePole.ToolTip
data.value: Project the latitude and longitude lines from the polar direction.

data.name: checkBox1DegLine.ToolTip
data.value: When checked, adds fine 1° grid lines to the stereonet; when cleared, only the coarser grid is shown.

data.name: trackBarPointSize.ToolTip
data.value: Set the radius of the projected direction or plane-normal points on the stereonet.

data.name: radioButtonUpperSphere.ToolTip
data.value: Show projected directions or plane normals on the upper hemisphere of the stereonet.

data.name: radioButtonLowerSphere.ToolTip
data.value: Show projected directions or plane normals on the lower hemisphere of the stereonet.

data.name: radioButtonWulff.ToolTip
data.value: Project directions by the Wulff net (equal-angle method)

data.name: radioButtonSchmidt.ToolTip
data.value: Project directions by the Schmidt-net (equiarea method)

data.name: checkBoxAnomalousDispersion.ToolTip
data.value: Add the energy-dependent X-ray anomalous-dispersion terms (f', f'') to the structure factor. Near an absorption edge Friedel's law breaks, giving Bijvoet (hkl vs -h-k-l) intensity differences. Uncheck for the classical dispersion-free result.

data.name: checkBoxReflectStructureFactor.ToolTip
data.value: Scale each spot's size by its structure factor (the amplitude scattered by one unit cell), so stronger reflections appear larger.

data.name: checkBoxShowIndexLabels.ToolTip
data.value: Draw the index label ([uvw] or (hkl)) beside each plotted point.

data.name: radioButtonAxes.ToolTip
data.value: Project crystal axes (zone directions) onto the stereonet and label them as [u v w].

data.name: radioButtonPlanes.ToolTip
data.value: Project crystal-plane normals onto the stereonet and label them as Miller indices (h k l).

data.name: radioButtonKikuchiLinePairs.ToolTip
data.value: Draw Kikuchi-line pairs, the paired bands produced when a crystal plane diffracts inelastically scattered electrons.

data.name: labelXYpos.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt and azimuth angles (in degrees) at the cursor position on the stereonet.

data.name: label6.ToolTip
data.value: Set the radius of projected index points on the stereonet.

data.name: label8.ToolTip
data.value: Set the radius of zone-axis points drawn for Kikuchi-line pairs.

data.name: trackBarKikuchiPointSize.ToolTip
data.value: Set the radius of zone-axis points drawn for Kikuchi-line pairs.

data.name: colorControlKikuchiPoints.ToolTip
data.value: Set the color of the poles and lines drawn in Kikuchi-line mode.

data.name: colorControlKikuchiPoints.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the color of the poles and lines drawn in Kikuchi-line mode.

data.name: colorControlKikuchiLabel.ToolTip
data.value: Set the color of the zone-axis labels in Kikuchi-line mode (Kikuchi lines: diffraction bands from inelastically scattered electrons).

data.name: colorControlKikuchiLabel.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the color of the zone-axis labels in Kikuchi-line mode (Kikuchi lines: diffraction bands from inelastically scattered electrons).

data.name: checkedListBoxCircles.ToolTip
data.value: List of added great circles (zone circles); tick to show or hide each circle, or select one to delete it

data.name: buttonAddCircle.ToolTip
data.value: Add a great circle (from a zone axis or from two lattice planes) to the stereographic projection.

data.name: buttonDeleteCircle.ToolTip
data.value: Remove the selected great circle from the stereographic projection.

data.name: colorControlGreatCircle.ToolTip
data.value: Set the drawing color of the great circles.

data.name: colorControlGreatCircle.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the drawing color of the great circles.

data.name: radioButtonCircleByAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Define a great circle (zone) by entering its zone-axis index [uvw]; the circle contains all planes sharing that axis.

data.name: indexControlAxis.ToolTip
data.value: Zone-axis direction [uvw]; the great circle perpendicular to this axis (its zone circle) is added to the stereonet

data.name: radioButtonCircleByPlanes.ToolTip
data.value: Define a great circle (zone) from two plane indices; their common zone axis (cross product) sets the circle.

data.name: indexControlCirclePlane1.ToolTip
data.value: First crystal plane index (hkl) of the pair; the line common to plane 1 and plane 2 defines the zone-axis great circle drawn on the stereonet

data.name: indexControlCirclePlane2.ToolTip
buttonYusaModeStop.ToolTip
data.value: Stop the tilt-scan simulation and copy the recorded pole trajectory coordinates to the clipboard.

data.name: buttonYusaModeStart.ToolTip
data.value: Start the goniometer tilt-scan simulation: animates the selected poles and records their stereographic trajectories.

data.name: radioButtonRotationalScan.ToolTip
data.value: Rotational scan mode: sweeps the tilt at a fixed radius (θ²+ω²=constant), tracing a circle on the stereonet.

data.name: radioButtonZigzagScan.ToolTip
data.value: Zigzag (raster) scan mode: steps θ back and forth while advancing ω (+θ → +ω → -θ → +ω …).

data.name: checkBox3.ToolTip
data.value: Enable rotation about the Ry axis (angle ω) during the scan.

data.name: checkBox2.ToolTip
data.value: Enable rotation about the Rz axis (angle θ) during the scan.

data.name: checkBox1.ToolTip
data.value: Enable rotation about the Rx axis (tilt angle φ) during the scan.

data.name: label25.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rx (φ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: label22.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rx (φ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRxSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rx (φ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRxSpeed.ToolTip1
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rx (φ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRySpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the Ry (ω) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRySpeed.ToolTip1
data.value: Rotation speed of the Ry (ω) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRzSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rz (θ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRzSpeed.ToolTip1
data.value: Rotation speed of the Rz (θ) motor, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxTotalTime.ToolTip
data.value: Total duration of the scan, in seconds.

data.name: numericBoxTotalTime.ToolTip1
data.value: Total duration of the scan, in seconds.

data.name: numericBoxAngularSpeed.ToolTip
data.value: Angular speed of the rotational scan, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxAngularSpeed.ToolTip1
data.value: Angular speed of the rotational scan, in degrees per second (°/s).

data.name: numericBoxRyStep.ToolTip
data.value: Angular step of the Ry (ω) scan per increment, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRyStep.ToolTip1
data.value: Angular step of the Ry (ω) scan per increment, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRadialAngle.ToolTip
data.value: Radial tilt angle (cone half-angle from the center) of the rotational scan, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRadialAngle.ToolTip1
data.value: Radial tilt angle (cone half-angle from the center) of the rotational scan, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRyOscillation.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation amplitude (±) of the Ry (ω) axis, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRyOscillation.ToolTip1
data.value: Oscillation amplitude (±) of the Ry (ω) axis, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRzOscillation.ToolTip
data.value: Oscillation amplitude (±) of the Rz (θ) axis, in degrees.

data.name: numericBoxRzOscillation.ToolTip1
data.value: Oscillation amplitude (±) of the Rz (θ) axis, in degrees.

data.name: waveLengthControl.ToolTip
data.value: Set the radiation source and wavelength used to compute structure-factor intensities and the Ewald-sphere reflection list shown on the stereonet

data.name: radioButtonRange.ToolTip
data.value: Display all indices within the range entered below; for axes this means [u v w], and for planes this means Miller indices (h k l).

data.name: radioButtonSpecifiedIndices.ToolTip
data.value: Display only the individual index entered below, instead of scanning a full index range.

data.name: radioButtonHighStructureFactor.ToolTip
data.value: Display the highest-ranked plane indices by structure-factor intensity; stronger structure factors correspond to stronger reflections.

data.name: listBoxSpecifiedIndices.ToolTip
data.value: List of user-specified indices projected on the stereonet; select rows to recolor or remove them

data.name: buttonAddIndex.ToolTip
data.value: Add the index entered above to the list of specified indices to be plotted.

data.name: buttonRemoveIndex.ToolTip
data.value: Remove the selected index from the list of specified indices.

data.name: colorControlIndex.ToolTip
data.value: Set the plot color for the index being added or currently selected (used when 'Rotate color' is off).

data.name: colorControlIndex.ToolTip1
data.value: Set the plot color for the index being added or currently selected (used when 'Rotate color' is off).

data.name: checkBoxRotateColor.ToolTip
data.value: Assign a rotating palette color to each index automatically; when off, all use the single color chosen at right.

data.name: numericBoxHighStructureFactor.ToolTip
data.value: Number of reflections to display, taken from the top of the structure-factor ranking (1–1000).

data.name: numericBoxHighStructureFactor.ToolTip1
data.value: Number of reflections to display, taken from the top of the structure-factor ranking (1–1000).

data.name: indexControlDrawing.ToolTip
data.value: Enter the index to plot — a single [uvw]/(hkl) in 'Specified' mode, or the maximum h,k,l in 'Range' mode.

data.name: checkBoxIncludingEquivalentPlanes.ToolTip
data.value: Also plot all symmetry-equivalent indices (the full {hkl} or <uvw> family), not just the one entered.

data.name: checkBoxDisplay3D.ToolTip
button3D_reset.ToolTip
data.value: Reset the 3-D view to its default orientation and zoom.

data.name: checkBox3dOptionLabel.ToolTip
data.value: In the 3-D view, draw the index labels ([uvw] or (hkl)) next to each plotted pole.

data.name: checkBox3dOptionSemisphere.ToolTip
data.value: In the 3-D view, plot only the points on the upper hemisphere (Z>0) instead of the whole sphere.

data.name: checkBox3dOptionStereonet.ToolTip
data.value: In the 3-D view, also draw the flat stereonet disk (the projection plane) with the projected points on it.

data.name: checkBox3dOptionSphere.ToolTip
data.value: In the 3-D view, draw the outline (latitude/longitude wireframe) of the reference sphere.

data.name: checkBox3dOptionProjectionLine.ToolTip
data.value: In the 3-D view, draw the projection rays connecting each pole on the sphere to its plotted point on the stereonet disk.

data.name: label29.ToolTip
data.value: Adjust depth cueing: how strongly objects fade with distance (depth) in the 3-D view.

data.name: trackBarDepthFadingOut.ToolTip
data.value: Adjust depth cueing: how strongly objects fade with distance (depth) in the 3-D view.

data.name: labelAxisPlane.ToolTip
data.value: Zone axis [uvw] and lattice plane (hkl) nearest the cursor position on the stereonet.

data.name: label2.ToolTip
data.value: Zone axis [uvw] and lattice plane (hkl) nearest the cursor position on the stereonet.

data.name: label3.ToolTip
data.value: Tilt and azimuth angles (in degrees) at the cursor position on the stereonet.
